text.title: Laravel Umbrella Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping feature shape to a sub-methodology + a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: apply php-laravel-queues + php-phpunit-testing; confirm Horizon + Supervisor
add to app/Console/Kernel.php schedule; confirm single cron entry; heartbeat ping
apply php-eloquent; pair migration + factory + Resource
skip-this-methodology — reach for Go/Rust or Octane only after benchmarking

text.example: shape=http_endpoint → route-to-sub-methodology → apply php-laravel-patterns (FormRequest + Action) + php-eloquent (Invoice model) + php-laravel-queues (ChargeInvoiceJob) + php-phpunit-testing (Pest feature test).
